description: Unique identity number portion of the 64-bit J1939 NAME.
notes: Bit positions use least-significant bit numbering.

description: Manufacturer code portion of the 64-bit J1939 NAME.
notes: Bit positions use least-significant bit numbering.

description: ECU instance field of the 64-bit J1939 NAME.
notes: Bit positions use least-significant bit numbering.

description: Function instance field of the 64-bit J1939 NAME.
notes: Bit positions use least-significant bit numbering.

description: Function field of the 64-bit J1939 NAME.
notes: Bit positions use least-significant bit numbering.

description: Vehicle system field of the 64-bit J1939 NAME. Bit 48 is reserved.
notes: Bit positions use least-significant bit numbering.

description: Vehicle system instance field of the 64-bit J1939 NAME.
notes: Bit positions use least-significant bit numbering.

description: Industry group field of the 64-bit J1939 NAME.
notes: Bit positions use least-significant bit numbering.

description: Flag indicating arbitrary address capability in the 64-bit J1939 NAME.
notes: Bit positions use least-significant bit numbering.
